name: Cagney Carnation
description:
Cagney Carnation was Cuphead! You got called to calm him down as he was acting very rude towards everyone nearby. 
If people are going after Flowey from Undertale, why not this giant idiot as well? 
Why, oh why?! Why the hell am I such a sick bastard 😭😭
creator: Sussybakalife
